description_long: This is a large, rectangular outdoor trash bin with a sloped, multi-faceted lid and a front-facing opening mechanism. The bin is beige in color and heavily covered with graffiti, posters, and stickers, giving it a distinctly urban, well-used appearance. The front features a prominent opening with three vertical flaps for depositing items, as well as a large instructional sign and recycling symbol. The sides and back are also marked with graffiti, but the back is otherwise plain and unadorned. The structure appears to be made primarily of metal, with some plastic or rubber components for the flaps and possible internal mechanisms. The overall build is robust, designed for public spaces and resistant to weather and vandalism.
description: A large, beige metal trash bin with a sloped lid, front opening flaps, and extensive graffiti and posters, designed for urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the sloped lid, graffiti, posters, and a recycling symbol on the upper section.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the main opening with three vertical flaps, instructional signage, and graffiti.
description_view_2: Front-right view similar to view 0, with clear visibility of posters, graffiti, and the recycling symbol.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain beige surface with graffiti but no openings or signage.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: recycling symbol, instructional signage, graffiti, and posters
